agent_system.coordination_style: SLA reliability mesh with specialist-agent routing, verifier coverage planning, provenance audits, rollback courts, incident replay, risk vetoes, and validation-gated RSI releases

benchmark_public.data_boundary: synthetic/redacted-style public benchmark; no private customer data
benchmark_public.name: Capability SLA Reliability Mesh benchmark

proof_type: Autonomous RSI Capability SLA Reliability Mesh Proof
public_boundary: Benchmark-capital-equivalent values are not live revenue, customer results, financial guarantees, legal advice, policy advice, token advice, medical advice, or proof of achieved superintelligence.

rsi_releases.lesson: seed static capability service before SLA reliability RSI
released SLA-aware routing, verifier coverage, and rollback update

safe_interpretation: A deterministic benchmark proof that SkillOS can transform verified skills into SLA-bound capability services with safe routing, verifier coverage, rollback planning, and validation-gated RSI. Not live revenue, customer results, financial advice, legal advice, token advice, policy advice, medical advice, or achieved superintelligence.

skills_used.name: Demand Decomposition
skills_used.purpose: Breaks incoming work into verifiable capability requirements.

skills_used.name: SLA Contract Extraction
skills_used.purpose: Extracts latency, quality, safety, and rollback obligations from each job.

skills_used.input_signal: latency sensitivity, capacity fit, agent reputation
skills_used.name: Latency-Aware Routing
skills_used.purpose: Routes work to skills and agents that can satisfy time-sensitive constraints.

skills_used.input_signal: supply capacity, demand urgency, skill fit
skills_used.name: Capacity Market Clearing
skills_used.purpose: Matches demand to verified specialist capacity without overload.

skills_used.name: Verifier Coverage Planning
skills_used.purpose: Allocates verifier capacity to the highest-risk and highest-value work.

skills_used.input_signal: trace IDs, signed receipts, prior outcomes
skills_used.name: Provenance Audit
skills_used.purpose: Checks whether the skill, agent, and trace history are replayable and trustworthy.

skills_used.input_signal: risk exposure, security exposure, compliance load
skills_used.name: Risk Veto
skills_used.purpose: Blocks routes that have unacceptable risk without sufficient rollback.

skills_used.name: Rollback Planning
skills_used.purpose: Ensures each routed action can be safely reversed or contained.

skills_used.name: Incident Replay
skills_used.purpose: Replays historical failure patterns before release promotion.

skills_used.name: Reliability Scoring
skills_used.purpose: Scores whether a route can satisfy quality and uptime expectations.

skills_used.name: Cost / Quality Arbitrage
skills_used.purpose: Balances cost pressure against quality, trust, and verifier coverage.

skills_used.input_signal: domain similarity, skill fit, reuse potential
skills_used.name: Cross-Domain Skill Transfer
skills_used.purpose: Applies verified skills from adjacent domains when the SLA fit is strong.

skills_used.name: Trust Signal Aggregation
skills_used.purpose: Combines reputation, provenance, customer trust, and verification density.

skills_used.input_signal: validation score, SLA breach rate, risk breach rate
skills_used.name: Release Gating
skills_used.purpose: Promotes only protocol updates that improve validation metrics without safety regression.

skills_used.input_signal: domain drift, incident deltas, outcome traces
skills_used.name: Drift Monitor
skills_used.purpose: Detects when service regimes shift and replay buffers must be reweighted.

skills_used.name: Postmortem Skill Mining
skills_used.purpose: Turns failures and near misses into reusable skill updates.

skills_used.name: Reinvestment Planner
skills_used.purpose: Allocates future verification and routing capacity to high-return skill gaps.

skills_used.input_signal: JSON receipt, markdown report, benchmark metrics
skills_used.name: Executive Receipt Publishing
skills_used.output: public proof page and registry entry
skills_used.purpose: Publishes proof receipts, metrics, and visual evidence for external inspection.

workflow: Autonomous RSI Capability SLA Reliability Mesh Proof
